'''Dresk Kist''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Slith]] with dark stripes down her scales.

==Biography==
Dresk Kist was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Slith]] who, by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], had served as [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] of her clan for six seasons. In her role as shaman, she communicated with other Slith clans, communed with the departed spirits of her ancestors and he desert [[Deity/Legends|gods]] worshipped by the Slith.<ref name="GG2-1" /> Kist also served as the [[First Mate/Legends|First Mate]] of the clan's alpha male, with authority over the other females and youngsters of the clan. She was also a huntress within the clan, hunting game while others were sleeping. It was unusual for shamans to also be huntresses, but Kist excelled in both fields.<ref name="GG2-2">[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition]]</ref>

Kist made contact with an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] negotiating team,<ref name="GG2-1" /> who were on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] searching for a base of operations.<ref name="GG2-2" />

==Personality and traits==
Dresk Kist was a two-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long, sleek Slith with patterned scales. She had piercing [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and venomous fangs. She was devout in her beliefs, and had a commanding, powerful presence.<ref name="GG2-1" />
